product_results.title: Nike Mens Nike Court Vision Mid Sneaker

summary.text: Customers find these shoes to be very good quality products. They describe them as comfortable with soft cushioning underfoot. The shoes are considered great-looking and very nice in appearance. Customers appreciate the nice fit, noting they are not too loose. However, customers have mixed opinions on durability and sizing.

authors_reviews.title: Great gift idea
authors_reviews.text: Bought for my hubby and he likes them, does say they run a little small though! Other than that I believe they’re authentic and he’s happy, so I am happy 😂
authors_reviews.author: amanda christensen

authors_reviews.title: Nice Shoes go a half size down when you order them
authors_reviews.text: I ordered these in my normal shoes size which is an 8 but they fit like a 8.5 -9 so go a half size downOverall they are really nice and comfortable
authors_reviews.author: Aidan

authors_reviews.title: Happy with my purchase.
authors_reviews.text: Came in perfect condition and on time. Love them, thank you.
authors_reviews.author: Randy

authors_reviews.title: Super Comfortable and very close to Jordan 11
authors_reviews.text: Tried these on and I’ll admit—they felt like walking on clouds. Super cushioned, solid build, definitely Jordan quality. But once I had them on feet, the style just didn’t click with me. Great shoe overall, and if you love the design, it'll definitely give you max aura
authors_reviews.author: Joe
